title: Quantum Oracle Sketching
subtitle: Loading classical data into quantum coherent oracles via incremental, streaming rotations
description: Implements the Boolean phase-oracle and real-valued state sketches of Zhao et al. (2026). Each per-sample gate phases a single basis state by an O(1/M) angle so that the product of M sample-driven rotations approaches the target oracle in diamond distance with error O(N/M). Includes a numpy reference, scaling verification, Classiq circuits for both sketches, and a streaming-runtime view.
